# Attention: Making the Kernel Learnable {#sec-13-attention}

::: {.callout-warning}
**Chapter stub.** This chapter is planned but not yet written. The abstract below is its
contract; drafting sources are listed for provenance.
:::

*Replace the fixed kernel with learned projections: queries, keys, values. Additive vs scaled dot-product (and why GPUs prefer the latter), the √d scaling, masking, multi-head. The seq2seq bottleneck falls.*

<!-- draft-sources
seeds:
- `sources/8.1-Attention.tex (rest)`
transcripts:
- `m08 lectures 2-3`
- `[coding]_m08_lecture-8-3-implementing-attention-in-seq2seq-de_nDcFkXXFzJs.txt`
-->
